data.raceName: STRADBROKE SEASON ON SALE NOW CLASS 3
data.raceComments: {"comment":"A Class 3 Plate is worth 75K, and will be run over 1615m. 13. PHENOM made an encouraging debut for the Todd Pollard stable when finishing runner-up here by just under a length a fortnight ago. The extra 265m is ideal, and in what is an easier assignment, she can have the last say. 8. SO YOU ARE was good enough to be placed in the Queensland Cup in the spring, and he found 1400m too short when resuming at Armidale nearly a month ago. He has won a trial there since then and is sure to be warming up late again in this. Include in all top 4 combos to be safe. 7. SIR WINNIE is making his way quickly through the grades, winning his last 2 races on the bounce. He has to carry more weight in a handy field, but he is very promising, and the hat-trick beckons. 11. CAPTAIN EAGLE has needed time to mature, and his debut effort for second here a fortnight ago was very encouraging. He will continue to improve over more ground, and he can figure in the top 4 again.","runners":[13,8,7,11],"exclusive":true}
